data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Opt-out handling with audit trail', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail but lacks specific evidence that this functionality has been implemented or validated. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence supporting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of opt-out handling with an audit trail.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for opt-out handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the implementation of opt-out handling and its audit trail.
